text:
Created attachment 185883
Bug fixes

Apply bug fix patches #1 and #4 available for Lua 5.3.4 at https://www.lua.org/bugs.html.

As I've done previously, the patches are available at https://github.com/salazar/lua.

I ran `portlint` and installed the package locally -- all looking good.
